name: snowflake-readonly-mcp
description: Secure, read-only access to your Snowflake warehouse. Browse schemas, execute queries, and export results — all without write permissions.
long_description: This MCP server provides read-only access with schema browsing, SQL execution, query validation, and CSV export. Supports browser SSO and key-pair authentication. Uses an intelligent schema cache for fast metadata lookups.

snowflake_account.title: Snowflake Account
snowflake_account.description: Your Snowflake account identifier (e.g. xy12345.us-east-1 or ORGNAME-ACCOUNTNAME). Find it in Snowflake: bottom-left corner → account name → View account details.

snowflake_username.title: Snowflake Username
snowflake_username.description: Your Snowflake login name or email. Find it on the same View Account Details page under 'Login Name'.

snowflake_warehouse.title: Snowflake Warehouse
snowflake_warehouse.description: Warehouse to use for queries (e.g. COMPUTE_WH). Any warehouse you have access to will work — the server only runs lightweight read-only queries.

snowflake_role.title: Snowflake Role
snowflake_role.description: Snowflake role with read access to your data (e.g. ANALYST). Run SELECT CURRENT_ROLE(); in Snowflake to see your current role.

snowflake_credential_file.title: Credential File (Optional)
snowflake_credential_file.description: Path to key-pair credential file for headless/server authentication. Leave empty to use browser SSO (recommended for most users).

tools.name: refresh_catalog
tools.description: Refresh the schema catalog by scanning all accessible databases

tools.name: show_tables
tools.description: Browse databases, schemas, and tables using pattern-based filtering

tools.name: find_tables
tools.description: Search for tables by keyword across all databases

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get detailed column information for a specific table

tools.name: execute_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query on Snowflake

tools.name: validate_query_without_execution
tools.description: Generate and validate a SQL query without executing it

tools.name: get_query_history
tools.description: Get the history of executed queries in this session

tools.name: save_last_query_to_csv
tools.description: Save the last query results to a CSV file

tools.name: execute_big_query_to_disk
tools.description: Execute a large query and save results directly to CSV
